text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It allows machines to read and interpret text, enabling tasks like automatic translation between languages. Another important use is sentiment analysis, where computers determine if a piece of writing expresses a positive, negative, or neutral opinion. You might also interact with NLP daily when using chatbots on websites or virtual assistants like Siri. These technologies rely on NLP to understand your questions and give useful answers. With NLP, computers are becoming much better at communicating with people in a natural way.
